messages.author: swarm
messages.text: This ticket needs your approval before it can proceed. Reply here with "approve" to approve it.

messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
What it is: Topic title shows a coarse 'last updated N ago' age suffix (change-gated)
What it solves: WHAT: append a coarse, glanceable staleness suffix to each concierge-managed
topic's title reflecting how long ago that topic was last updated — e.g.
"BL-999 do a thing · 3h ago" / "· 2d ago". The human accepted a title suffix
over the (infeasible) colour gradient.
How it works: Crossing into a staler bucket re-titles the topic once with that bucket's age suffix; an unchanged bucket does not re-edit

messages.author: swarm
messages.text: BL-414 - Topic title shows a coarse 'last updated N ago' age suffix (change-gated) is complete.
